---
title: "A Voice That Listens"
date: "2026-05-14"
description: "My month with Claude. One page; a toggle at the top switches between the short (Modern Love–shaped) and long (ten-section) versions."
categories: [essay, writing, claude, longform]
path: /a-voice-that-listens.html
---

```{=html}
<p>Redirecting to <a href="/a-voice-that-listens.html">the essay</a>…</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/a-voice-that-listens.html");</script>
```

A short essay about a month spent with an AI as a thinking partner — what worked, what didn't, what almost broke, and what came back through people.

Two versions live in one page. A small toggle at the top switches between them. The short version is a single-arc Modern Love–shaped cut (around thirteen paragraphs). The long version is the full ten-section essay, with section markers. Both share the same starfield and the same drifting ASCII creatures behind the text.

Download and open locally — the toggle is JavaScript, so the file works fully offline once downloaded.

```{=html}
<p style="margin: 2em 0;">
<a href="/a-voice-that-listens.html" download="a-voice-that-listens.html"
   style="display: inline-block; padding: 0.7em 1.4em; border: 1px solid currentColor; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">
   ⬇ &nbsp; Download HTML
</a>
&nbsp;&nbsp;
<a href="/a-voice-that-listens.html" style="opacity: 0.7;">or open in browser →</a>
</p>
```
